/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wno-comment -Wno-reorder -Wno-unused-variable -Wtype-limits -std=c++14 -fno-strict-aliasing -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -march=native -mfpmath=sse -mavx2 -DLV_HAVE_AVX2 -DLV_HAVE_AVX -DLV_HAVE_SSE -fvisibility=hidden -O3 -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE -Werror -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/nr_cell_search_rf.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/nr_cell_search_rf.dir/nr_cell_search_rf.cc.o -o nr_cell_search_rf  -Wl,-rpath,/home/avi/wireless/ra-spoof/srsRAN_4G/build/lib/src/phy/rf ../libsrsue_phy.a ../../../../lib/src/common/libsrsran_common.a ../../../../lib/src/phy/libsrsran_phy.a ../../../../lib/src/radio/libsrsran_radio.a /usr/lib64/libboost_program_options.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib64/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 ../../../../lib/src/common/libsrsran_common.a ../../../../lib/src/support/libsupport.a ../../../../lib/src/srslog/libsrslog.a /lib64/libmbedcrypto.so /usr/lib64/libdw.so ../../../../lib/src/phy/rf/libsrsran_rf.so.25.10.0 -ldl ../../../../lib/src/phy/rf/libsrsran_rf_utils.a ../../../../lib/src/phy/libsrsran_phy.a -lpthread -lm /usr/lib64/libfftw3f.so
